info.english_meaning: to cover to hide to clothe

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'apAgUhannamftAM mayeByaH' (saraRyUm) (f0 10172) apAgUhan saMvftavantaH
'mA varpo asmad apa gUha etat' (f0 71006) mApagUhaH saMvftaM mA kuru
'indrAgnI vA etasya prajAmapa gUhataH' (sE0 saM0 2211)
'padaM na gorapagUQaM vividvAn' (f0 453) apagUQamatyantaM gUQaM tiraskftaM tirohitam
'AvizkfRuzva rUpARi mAtmAnamapa gUhaTAH' (aTarva0 4205) mA'pagUhaTA mA'pagUhizWA mA tiroDAH mA saMvfTAH mA saMvarizWAH mA saMvarIzWAH
saNgUQaH syAtsaNkalita ityamaraH sampiRqita ityAha
'rajasvaleva yuvatiH senA samavagUhate' (hari0 210583) AtmAnamiti SezaH dehaM saMkocayati aNgAni saMharati
'yA mamodvijate nityaM sA mAmadyAvagUhate' (paYcata0 4) avagUhate=upagUhate=ASlizyati
'vfdDamiva patiM pramadA necCatyavagUhituM lakzmIH' (tantrA0 2390) avagUhitum upagUhitum
'UrDvamevodgUhati' (rajjum) (Sa0 brA0 13117) udgUhati UrDvamAvartayati UrDvamiti voditi vA SakyamekataraM parihartum
'nIvimudgUhate' (Sa0 brA0 32115) visraMsayatItyarTaH
'SAKAmudgUhati… yajamAnasyeti ize tvA' (tE0 saM0 111 ityatra BawwaBAskaraH) udgUhati upagUhati
'pratyagUhurmahAnadyaH' (BA0 sO0 13) pratyagUhuH pratyagUhan (pratyagUhanta) antaradaData tiro'daData
'asatAM ca parikzepaH satAM ca parigUhanam' (BA0 nI0 sA0 1451) parigUhanaM pUjayA svIkaraRam iti maNgalA saMvaraRamityupADyAyanirapekzA
'yajamAnasya paSunpAhI tyagnizWe'tasyagnyagAre vA purastAtpratIcIM SAKAmupagUhati paScAtprAcIM vA' (Apa0 SrO0 11210) upagUhati aprakASAM karotIti DUrtasvAmI
'OdumbarIM SAKAmupagUhati' (Sa0 brA0 54325) upagUhati tiraskaroti saMvfRoti pracCAdayati gopAyati
'sopAgUhad BujAByAM tu fziM prItyA nararzaBa' (BA0 anu0 1979) upAgUhat ASlizyat upASlizyat AliNgat paryaraBata
'taraNgahastErupagUhatIva' (raGu0 1363)
'apUjayankulajyezWAn upAgUhanta bAlakAn' (Bawwi0 172) ukto'rTaH
'sA'yoDyAmupagUhate' (rA0 1249) Avftya pravahatItyarTaH
'puRyASca nadyaH salilopagUQAH' (hari0 33550) salilena cCannAH salilasya pUrRA ityarTaH
'pfTivyAM pfTivIhetoH pfTivIpatayo hatAH pfTivImupaguhyANgEH suptAH kAntAmiva priyAm' (BA0 droRa0 14848-49).. upaguhya=AliNgya
'upagUhanaSezo vA pUrvaH' ( kA0 SrO0 6106) saMvaraRamantrasyAyaM Seza ityarTaH
